title: Skill Frontmatter
description: The contract every SKILL.md frontmatter must satisfy. Enforced by scripts/skills-health.mjs before link-agents.sh deploys. This is the drift firewall: a skill that fails the schema never reaches the harness.

name.description: kebab-case; MUST equal the skill's directory name (the skills.sh @handle).

description.description: What it does + a 'USE WHEN ...' trigger. The trigger is the routing key the orchestrator matches intent against.

cluster.description: The cluster this skill belongs to (matches a skills.sh.json grouping). Recommended.

version.description: semver. Recommended; prevents the version-drift ECC suffered (only 25/251 had it).

origin.description: Attribution for extracted/imported skills, e.g. 'affaan-m/ECC (MIT)'. Required by convention for anything not authored here.

supersedes.description: If set, names a skill this replaces. The health gate ERRORS if that skill still exists live (no superseded-but-not-removed, ECC's churn bug).
